Lee J. Novich, Esq. of the Construction Law Group, Tel. 415.537.3900, plaintiff and moving party appearing on his own behalf;
Derek J. Stafford, Esq. of the Construction Law Group, Tel. 415.537.3900, for plaintiff and moving party;
Michael L. Hanks, Esq. of the Law Offices of Michael Hanks, Tel. 916.635.0302 ext 1, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. In order for the Third Party Claimant to be present at the hearing, the Court continued PLAINTIFF LEE NOVICH'S Hearing on Petition To Determine The Validity Of A Third-Party Claim And The Proper Disposition Of The Subject Property. Ms. Amick should be prepared to address 1.) why the account is in both her and David Amick's name; 2.) the source of deposits to the account made subsequent to September 2012. Mr. Novich is to provide further proof of service of the notice of undertaking. The proof of service dated August 12, 2013 does not indicate the individuals served or their addresses. The Clerk shall notify the parties of the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
(The matter is continued to October 11, 2013 at 1:45 pm in Dept. 514 to be heard by Judge Sullivan.)
